scientificStatus: solver contract implemented; indexed experimental geometry, production impulse coupling, and measured force registration accepted; preregistered RR3 D28 and D32 source-viscosity windows both complete all steps and 187 force bins with positive populations, closed momentum ledgers, and negligible correction intrusion; the independently audited D28/D32 phase-resolved force-history change is 5.6322% against the frozen 5% fine-pair limit, so stabilization, D36, grid convergence, production promotion, and experimental agreement remain rejected; the valid preregistered 0.025...0.030 s D28/D32 component replays reproduce archived forces exactly and a 15-check signed-energy audit identifies reflected-population self energy as the stable 58.43% dominant absolute-ledger contribution; same-specimen biological free-flight input also remains open

whole-bird mass and principal inertia for this specimen
bilateral wing mass, center of mass, and inertia

alternativeExperimentalValidation.source: Deetjen et al. Ringneck-dove synchronized surface, kinematics, and aerodynamic-force dataset

sourceViscosityTargetedBoundaryResult.invalidV1Failure: runner used plan Reynolds instead of source-property Reynolds; archived-force reproduction relative RMS was 0.0938017

alternativeExperimentalValidation.reasonFreeFlightRemainsBlocked: the source assumes bilateral surface symmetry and models the distributed wing mass; same-specimen bilateral wing and registered whole-bird inertia are not measured
alternativeExperimentalValidation.antiFabricationRule: derived lateral force, per-wing loads, or modeled inertia must not be relabeled as experimental measurements
alternativeExperimentalValidation.nextAction: record selected-link pre-step reflected-population provenance at D28/D32, conditioned on the audited 0.025...0.030 s interval, to distinguish bulk collision/transport history from near-wall interpolation history; do not allocate D36 or modify production force physics

releaseDecision.blockingCondition: provide one schema-2 dataset whose complete geometry, bilateral kinematics, whole-bird inertia, and bilateral wing mass properties all identify the same specimen
releaseDecision.nextAction: continue same-specimen inertia requests independently while using the audited reflected-population result only to design a selected-link D28/D32 provenance canonical; do not present the engineering Reynolds proxy as published, either numerical window as experimental agreement, or a prescribed replay as free flight
releaseDecision.antiFabricationRule: do not substitute another specimen's body, mass, inertia, tail, or contralateral wing and call the result measured
